source: MANUAL SNAPSHOT — rates transcribed from earlier project session (Brandon-confirmed at that time). NOT live.
snapshot_date: approximate; Runes of Aldur launched 2026-05-29, so early-league prices are volatile and inflate over time
refresh: Run `python prices.py` locally to pull live in-game-exchange rates from POE2 Scout (the fetch tool here cannot reach the live API). Currency values shift fast in the first weeks of a league; refresh before trusting absolute ex costs.
note: Exalted=1.0 base unit. Divine/Annul/Chaos were verified live earlier; bone/omen prices are reasonable estimates. RELATIVE comparisons between craft methods are robust; ABSOLUTE ex costs are only as current as this snapshot.
